response.justification: Wei Chen is an exceptionally strong candidate who exceeds the 6+ year requirement with 14+ years of progressive experience. The current Staff Software Engineer role at re:cinq demonstrates mastery of the exact primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS) and uniquely includes direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks—a rare and highly valuable skill. The only minor gaps are the absence of explicit Nest.js and Vitest mentions, though strong TDD practices and testing framework expertise throughout the career suggest these are easily acquirable.
strengths: Perfect alignment on primary tech stack with current, active experience in TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, and AWS CDK
Direct AI-agent infrastructure and MCP development experience at current role—exactly matching the required AI agent development capability
Demonstrates exceptional depth across backend, frontend, mobile, and embedded systems with 14+ years of full-stack engineering and strong TDD culture
concerns: Nest.js framework not explicitly mentioned despite extensive Node.js backend experience across multiple companies
Vitest specifically not listed, though resume shows strong testing expertise with multiple frameworks and TDD practices
Current Staff Software Engineer role suggests candidate may be overqualified and could seek growth opportunities beyond Mid-Senior IC responsibilities

key_factors.factor: Primary tech stack expertise (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS)
AI-agent infrastructure and MCP development experience
